description: Cross-validation of Moonlab matrix-free Lanczos ground-state energy against the published PRB 83, 212401 (2011) Table I cluster '18b' value (a=(2,-2), b=(-2,-1), 2x3 kagome torus).  Closes the moonlab paper §4.1 cross-validation claim with archived numerical agreement.

reference.citation: A. M. Läuchli, J. Sudan, E. S. Sørensen, PRB 83, 212401 (2011), Table I cluster 18b
